fml.menu.mods.info.description.cartridge: Add Cartridge (and the curse mechanism) from Made in Abyss to Minecraft
death.attack.cartridge.curse: %1$s died from the Curse of the Abyss
death.attack.cartridge.curse.player: %1$s died from the Curse of the Abyss while trying to flee from %2$s
tooltip.cartridge.abyss_edit.start: Right-click to select the first point
tooltip.cartridge.abyss_edit.end1: Right-click to select the second point
gui.cartridge.creation_confirm: %1$s wants to turn you into a Cartridge.
death.attack.cartridge.cartridge: %1$s ended their life as a Cartridge
death.attack.cartridge.curse_side_effect: %1$s died from the side effects of the Curse
%1$s died from the side effects of the Curse while trying to flee from %2$s
tooltip.cartridge.hollow_randomizer: Only works on Hollows summoned via the /summon command
error.cartridge.not_player: Command not issued by a player
command.cartridge.hollow: You have been turned into a Hollow via command
command.cartridge.hollow.source: Turned %1$d player(s) into Hollows via command
command.cartridge.hollow.player: %1$s turned you into a Hollow via command
command.cartridge.hollow.block: You were turned into a Hollow by a command block
death.attack.cartridge.sparagmos: %1$s was incinerated by the Essence-returning Light
death.attack.cartridge.sparagmos.player: %1$s was incinerated by the Essence-returning Light fired by %2$s
item.cartridge.sparagmos.tooltip: Press %1$s after equipping to enter Combat Mode. Keys: %2$s / %3$s
message.cartridge.exit_combat_mode: Press %1$s again to exit Combat Mode
item.cartridge.gangway.tooltip: Press %1$s after equipping to enter Combat Mode. Key: %2$s
death.attack.cartridge.gangway: %1$s is pierced by the Ascend to the Morning Star
death.attack.cartridge.gangway.player: %1$s is pierced by the Ascend to the Morning Star fired by %2$s
task.cartridge.become_cartridge.desc: The maid will find a surgery table and become a Cartridge
task.cartridge.become_cartridge.conditio: Need a favorability level at least 384
advancement.cartridge.maid.description: Use a maid to make Cartridge
